needsReview.heading: No requests to review
needsReview.body: New time off requests will appear here.

approved.heading: No approved requests yet
approved.body: Once time off is approved, it will appear here.

completed.heading: No completed time off yet
completed.body: Once approved time off is completed, it will appear here.

declined.heading: No declined requests
declined.body: If a time off request is declined, it will appear here.

show.title: {{policyType}} request
show.employerNoteRequired: A note to the employee is required when declining a request

new.title: Add time off
new.subtitle: Time off you record for an employee is approved automatically.

dateHoursFields.invalidDateRange: End date must be on or after start date.

duration.title: Duration
duration.description: Choose how many hours of time off to record for the selected dates.
duration.fullDaysDescription: Automatically counts 8 hours for each weekday (Monday - Friday). Weekends are excluded.
duration.partialDaysDescription: Use this option to specify the exact number of hours for each day.

balancePreview.title: Time off balance for this policy
balancePreview.availableBalanceHint: The amount of time off this employee has available today to use on this policy.
balancePreview.otherRequestedHint: Any other approved future time off and pending time off under this policy. Excludes this request.
balancePreview.negativeBalanceWarning: If you approve this request, the employee will end up with a negative time off balance.

flash.employerNoteRequired: A note is required when declining a request
